title: CropBuddy
description: CropBuddy is a simple plugin that prevents crop trample and lets you right click harvest and replant.
body:
# CropBuddy

CropBuddy is a very light weight and easy to use plugin that enchances your minecraft farming experience!

- Prevent Crops from being trampled by players or mobs
- Allow right click harvesting of crops with auto-replaning of the seeds using either just your hand or with a hoe of choice (Fortune ecnhants work with the Hoe auto-planting!)
- Adjust drop values of crops and seeds.
- Make changes on the fly with the /cropreload command to reload the config file without having to restart your server.
